ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_assessment: High quality, text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_assessment: High quality, text-based PDF. All fields clearly readable.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains references SI0071537/CAW015344 which are invoice/order references, not LC references. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar is present.

locations_found.context: Company name in invoice header alongside 'Elof Hansson Trade AB'
Company name printed above total payment section

document_pairing.method: Certificate remarks reference SI0071537/CAW015344 matches invoice number SI0071537 and our ref CAW015344 in the invoice file.

criteria_met: Certificate invoice reference SI0071537 matches invoice number SI0071537
Certificate consignor NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO can be identified in invoice (header and footer)
Certificate consignee Pressmaster Africa Ltd matches invoice buyer Pressmaster Africa Ltd

checkpoints.certificate_value: NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO, Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden
checkpoints.invoice_value: Nils Troedsson Paper Co. (header and footer), Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for certificate consignor name 'NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO' anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.details: The name 'Nils Troedsson Paper Co.' is found in the invoice header (alongside 'Elof Hansson Trade AB') and as 'NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO.' in the invoice footer area. After normalization of case and trailing period, this is an exact match.
The invoice header address explicitly states 'SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden'. Country Sweden is explicitly stated.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice header and footer

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO' at Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden. The invoice is issued under a dual branding: 'Nils Troedsson Paper Co. / Elof Hansson Trade AB' in the header, and 'NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO.' appears in the footer. Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name is explicitly found in the invoice (both in header branding and footer text). After normalization of case and the trailing period in 'Paper Co.' vs 'PAPER CO', the names match exactly. The address 'Första Långgatan 17, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden' in the invoice matches the certificate address. Country Sweden is explicitly stated in the invoice header address. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because invoice issuer is 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' which differs from certificate consignor
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name 'Nils Troedsson Paper Co.' is explicitly found in the invoice header and footer. The fact that 'Elof Hansson Trade AB' also appears does not negate the presence of the consignor name. Group structure rule satisfied.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Pressmaster Africa Ltd, Catherine Ndereba Road, Off-Airport North Road, P.O BOX 17560, 00500 Nairobi, Kenya
checkpoints.invoice_value: Pressmaster Africa Ltd, Catherine Ndereba Road, Off-Airport North Road, P.O BOX 17560, 00500 NAIROBI, Kenya

comparison_steps.description: Identify the primary billing field in the invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has a 'BUYER' field containing 'Pressmaster Africa Ltd' with full address.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice buyer name
comparison_steps.details: 'Pressmaster Africa Ltd' in certificate matches 'Pressmaster Africa Ltd' in invoice BUYER field exactly.
Certificate states Kenya, invoice BUYER field states Kenya.

rules_applied.description: Priority order - BUYER field identified as primary billing field

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Pressmaster Africa Ltd' at Catherine Ndereba Road, Off-Airport North Road, P.O BOX 17560, 00500 Nairobi, Kenya. Invoice BUYER field states 'Pressmaster Africa Ltd' at Catherine Ndereba Road, Off-Airport North Road, P.O BOX 17560, 00500 NAIROBI, Kenya. Company name matches exactly. Address matches (only case difference in 'Nairobi' vs 'NAIROBI' which is allowed normalization). Country Kenya matches. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: PE-Coated Board, As per agreed selections, Total quantity: 102 reels - 77,222 mt, Core/Dia: Mill Standard, Country of Supply: Finland, IDF NO: 25EMKIM001438148, HS CODE: 48115900
checkpoints.invoice_value: PE-Coated Board, As per agreed selections, Total quantity: 102 reels - 77,222 mt, Core/Dia: Mill Standard, Country of Supply: Finland, IDF NO: 25EMKIM001438148, HS CODE: 48115900

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.details: No specific article numbers are stated in the certificate. IDF NO and HS CODE are reference codes, not article numbers in the commercial sense.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation and match against invoice
comparison_steps.details: The identity-bearing main designation is 'PE-Coated Board'. This exact text appears in the invoice description column. Additionally, all supplementary description lines match exactly: 'As per agreed selections', 'Total quantity: 102 reels - 77,222 mt', 'Core/Dia: Mill Standard', 'Country of Supply: Finland', 'IDF NO: 25EMKIM001438148', 'HS CODE: 48115900'.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching - identity-bearing main designation 'PE-Coated Board' found exactly in invoice
Additional non-identity-bearing details also match exactly

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'PE-Coated Board' with details 'As per agreed selections, Total quantity: 102 reels - 77,222 mt, Core/Dia: Mill Standard, Country of Supply: Finland, IDF NO: 25EMKIM001438148, HS CODE: 48115900'. Invoice goods description: 'PE-Coated Board' with identical detail lines. The identity-bearing main designation 'PE-Coated Board' is found exactly in the invoice. All supplementary detail lines match exactly. MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Check that certificate quantity has both numeric value and unit
comparison_steps.details: Certificate box 7 states '77,222 MT G/W'. Numeric value: 77.222 (using comma as decimal separator given European context and MT unit). Unit: MT. Weight category: G/W (Gross Weight).
Box 7 contains '77,222 MT G/W'. This is the verification-basis quantity.

comparison_steps.description: Verify numeric value 77.222 MT in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice line item quantity: '77,222 MT'. Invoice total qty: '77,222 MT'. The numeric value 77.222 matches exactly. Unit MT matches.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states G/W (Gross Weight). Check invoice for weight category.
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states G/W. Invoice does not specify GW or NW explicitly for the 77,222 MT value. However, per rule 4.4.4, difference in weight category designation alone does not cause MISMATCH when numeric value and unit match. The invoice has only one weight value (77,222 MT) and does not contain any contradicting alternative weight value. Per 4.4.2.2 point 2: certificate has one weight value, it can be identified in invoice, and invoice does not contain a conflicting alternative weight of another category → MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Occurrence check - numeric value 77.222 MT found in invoice
Single weight value without conflicting alternative in invoice - point 2 applies
Total weight in invoice matches certificate

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states '77,222 MT G/W'. The comma in '77,222' is interpreted as a decimal separator (European notation), giving 77.222 MT. Invoice line item shows '77,222 MT' and total qty shows '77,222 MT'. Same numeric value 77.222, same unit MT. Certificate specifies G/W (Gross Weight). Invoice does not specify GW/NW but contains only one weight value and no conflicting alternative. Per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, when certificate has a single weight value identifiable in the invoice with no conflicting alternative → MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: 77,222 could be interpreted as 77222 (seventy-seven thousand two hundred twenty-two) using comma as thousands separator
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: In context of MT (metric tons), 77,222 MT makes sense as 77.222 metric tons for 102 reels of PE-Coated Board. 77,222 MT (77 thousand tons) would be unreasonable for this shipment. The invoice consistently uses comma as decimal separator (e.g., '280,00' unit price, '21 622,16' amount). Therefore 77,222 = 77.222 MT.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice has explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' with value 'Finland'.
Both documents state 'Finland' as country of origin. Exact match, no normalization needed.

comparison_steps.description: Check if EU normalization is needed
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states Finland specifically (not EU). Invoice states Finland. Finland is an EU member state but EU normalization is not needed since both documents name the same specific country.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field
Exact match - Finland in both documents

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states 'Finland' as country of origin. Invoice has explicit field 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' with value 'Finland'. Exact match. No normalization needed. MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate
Certificate file contains one certificate. Invoice file contains one invoice. Certificate remarks SI0071537/CAW015344 match invoice number SI0071537 and OUR REF CAW015344. Pairing confirmed.
PASS - All three criteria met: invoice reference matches, consignor found in invoice, consignee found in invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Group structure - consignor search in all invoice pages
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - 'Nils Troedsson Paper Co.' found in invoice header and 'NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO.' found in invoice footer. Country Sweden confirmed via invoice header address.
BUYER field identified with 'Pressmaster Africa Ltd' - exact match with certificate consignee.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH - 'PE-Coated Board' found exactly in invoice with identical detail lines.
MATCH - 77.222 MT found in invoice line item and total row.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Weight category check - single weight value
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Point 2 applied - single weight value, identifiable in invoice, no conflicting alternative → MATCH.
MATCH - 'Finland' found in explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field in invoice.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Nils Troedsson Paper Co återfinns i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot, mottagaren Pressmaster Africa Ltd matchar fakturans köpare, varubeskrivningen PE-Coated Board är identisk, kvantiteten 77,222 MT överensstämmer och ursprungslandet Finland anges i båda dokumenten. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.decision_reasoning: All five checkpoints (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, country of origin) return MATCH with high confidence. Consignor verified via rule 4.1.0 (group structure - name found explicitly in invoice header and footer). Consignee verified via BUYER field exact match. Goods description verified via exact text match of identity-bearing designation 'PE-Coated Board'. Quantity 77.222 MT verified via occurrence in invoice line item and total row. Country of origin Finland verified via explicit COUNTRY OF ORIGIN field in invoice. No mismatches, no manual review needed.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair_summary: Certifikat SEG-26D-464615 (utfärdat 2026-02-27) verifierat mot faktura SI0071537 (daterad 2026-02-17). Avsändare: Nils Troedsson Paper Co, Göteborg, Sweden. Mottagare: Pressmaster Africa Ltd, Nairobi, Kenya. Vara: PE-Coated Board, 77.222 MT. Ursprung: Finland.

sections.certificate_value: NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO, Första Långgatan 17, 41380, Göteborg, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Nils Troedsson Paper Co. / Elof Hansson Trade AB, Första Långgatan 17, SE-413 80 Göteborg, Sweden (header); NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO. (footer)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur/gruppregel – consignor-namn återfunnet uttryckligen i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO' återfinns uttryckligen i fakturans sidhuvud som 'Nils Troedsson Paper Co.' och i fakturans nedre del som 'NILS TROEDSSON PAPER CO.' Namnen är identiska efter normalisering av versaler och avslutande punkt. Adress och land (Första Långgatan 17, Göteborg, Sweden) överensstämmer. MATCH via regel 4.1.0.

sections.certificate_value: Pressmaster Africa Ltd, Catherine Ndereba Road, Off-Airport North Road, P.O BOX 17560, 00500 Nairobi, Kenya
sections.invoice_value: Pressmaster Africa Ltd, Catherine Ndereba Road, Off-Airport North Road, P.O BOX 17560, 00500 NAIROBI, Kenya
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Pressmaster Africa Ltd' matchar exakt fakturans BUYER-fält. Adress och land (Kenya) överensstämmer. Enda skillnad är versaler i 'Nairobi' vs 'NAIROBI', vilket är tillåten normalisering. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: PE-Coated Board, As per agreed selections, Total quantity: 102 reels - 77,222 mt, Core/Dia: Mill Standard, Country of Supply: Finland, IDF NO: 25EMKIM001438148, HS CODE: 48115900
sections.invoice_value: PE-Coated Board, As per agreed selections, Total quantity: 102 reels - 77,222 mt, Core/Dia: Mill Standard, Country of Supply: Finland, IDF NO: 25EMKIM001438148, HS CODE: 48115900
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning och detaljer matchar exakt
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'PE-Coated Board' återfinns exakt i fakturans beskrivningskolumn. Samtliga detaljer (agreed selections, reelantal, core/dia, IDF-nummer, HS-kod) överensstämmer exakt. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll – numeriskt värde och enhet identifierade i faktura
sections.motivation: Certifikatets box 7 anger '77,222 MT G/W' (77.222 metriska ton bruttovikt). Fakturan anger '77,222 MT' i både radkvantiteten och totalraden. Numeriskt värde 77.222 och enhet MT överensstämmer exakt. Certifikatet anger G/W (bruttovikt); fakturan specificerar inte viktkategori men anger bara ett viktvärde utan motstridigt alternativ. Per regel 4.4.2.2 punkt 2 → MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Exakt matchning av ursprungsland i dedikerat fält
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ruta 3 anger 'Finland'. Fakturan har ett explicit fält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' med värdet 'Finland'. Exakt matchning. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All 5 checkpoints are MATCH → comparison_result = IDENTICAL. All confidences ≥ 0.85 → no confidence floor violation. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
output_quality_checks.confidence_floor_details: Minimum checkpoint confidence is 0.97 (consignor), which exceeds the 0.85 floor.
